decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using direct burn spells and creatures with abilities that trigger whenever a spell is cast. By casting cheap spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, as well as utilizing cards like Guttersnipe and Sneaky Snacker to generate additional damage, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize helps maintain card advantage and consistency in drawing the necessary burn spells.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through removal spells and utility creatures like Avenging Hunter and Sagu Wildling. It also utilizes cards like Writhing Chrysalis and Campfire to generate value and protect your life total. Additionally, the deck includes tools like Nihil Spellbomb and Ichor Wellspring to disrupt opponent's strategies. By efficiently managing resources and using efficient removal spells like Cast Down and Skred, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and establish a dominant board presence by utilizing the Golgari / Jund Garden mana base.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using cheap aggressive creatures and burn spells. Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather provide additional damage while Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker help to maintain board presence. Fiery Temper, Fireblast, Lightning Bolt, and Lava Dart are all efficient burn spells to finish off the opponent. Faithless Looting allows for card draw and filtering, while Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide resources to keep up the aggression. With a high number of mountains, this deck aims to win swiftly through aggressive play.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of powerful and efficient Elf creatures. By utilizing mana-producing Elves and cards that help draw more creatures, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and pump up its creatures with abilities like Timberwatch Elf. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help refill the hand with more Elves to keep the pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck focuses on aggressive plays and leveraging the synergy between Elf creatures to dominate the battlefield.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using Elves as the main creature type. By playing mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, the deck aims to ramp quickly into powerful threats like Nyxborn Hydra and Timberwatch Elf. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill the hand with more Elf creatures, keeping the pressure on the opponent and ensuring a constant stream of threats. Overall, this deck focuses on swarming the board with Elves and building up a powerful board presence to outpace the opponent.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, allowing for early plays and aggressive creatures like Avenging Hunter and Nyxborn Hydra. The deck also includes removal spells like Ram Through and Malevolent Rumble to deal with opposing threats. With a mix of efficient creatures, combat tricks, and mana acceleration, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive game plan.

The main focus of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Aggro-Jund deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creature removal, resource generation, and sacrifice effects. The deck utilizes a mix of creature and artifact spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is designed to provide consistent access to all the colors needed for the variety of spells cast. Overall, this deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while outmaneuvering them with targeted removal and sacrificing effects.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly mill through your library using Balustrade Spy's ability to put all cards into your graveyard, and then use Dread Return to bring back a powerful creature like Lotleth Giant to deal a massive amount of damage to your opponent in one turn. This combo relies on generating mana through creatures like Overgrown Battlement and Wall of Roots, and using cards like Lead the Stampede and Winding Way to refill your hand with creatures to continue the combo. Overall, the deck focuses on fast and explosive plays to overwhelm your opponent.

The deck aims to control the game through a combination of countering spells, removal, and card advantage. It utilizes creatures with evasion and enters-the-battlefield triggers to maintain board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan. By efficiently managing resources and generating card advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and eventually win through incremental advantage. The inclusion of cards like Lórien Revealed and Contaminated Aquifer helps to further disrupt the opponent's strategies and give the deck an edge in longer games.

The deck focuses on utilizing Gates to control the opponent's actions while protecting itself with a variety of spells and creatures. The key strategy involves using Counterspell and Prismatic Strands to disrupt the opponent's plans, while Journey to Nowhere and Thraben Charm help deal with threats on the board. Guardian of the Guildpact provides a solid defender, while Outlaw Medic can gain life and give the deck some staying power. Sacred Cat and Squadron Hawk help with early board presence, while cards like Brainstorm and The Modern Age provide card advantage and flexibility.

This Golgari / Jund Garden control deck focuses on using graveyard recursion and sacrificing creatures to control the board. It utilizes Crypt Rats and Troll of Khazad-dûm for board wipes, while Refurbished Familiar and Fanatical Offering provide additional value through sacrifice effects. The deck also includes removal spells like Cast Down and Snuff Out to deal with threats, as well as cards like Nihil Spellbomb to disrupt opponent's graveyard strategies. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue opponents through efficient creature recursion and removal while maintaining board presence through token generation.

The deck focuses on leveraging artifacts to quickly build a strong board presence and overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. By using cheap artifact creatures and spells like Galvanic Blast, Thoughtcast, and Myr Enforcer, the deck aims to establish a fast and powerful board state. The inclusion of cards like Krark-Clan Shaman and Reckoner's Bargain also provides additional control and damage options. The mana base is optimized to support the artifact-focused strategy, allowing for consistent casting of key cards.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By using cards like Gixian Infiltrator and Writhing Chrysalis to apply pressure, along with Cast Down and Fanatical Offering to deal with threats, the deck aims to establish early board control and maintain it throughout the game. The inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Cleansing Wildfire provide additional utility and disruption, ensuring that the opponent is constantly on the back foot. With a solid mana base and a mix of threats and answers, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's actions through countering spells and disrupting their strategy. With a combination of counter spells, draw spells, and creatures like Cryptic Serpent and Murmuring Mystic, the deck aims to maintain board control and out-value the opponent. By utilizing cards like Sleep of the Dead and Unable to Scream, the deck can lock down the opponent's creatures and prevent them from mounting a significant offense. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through incremental advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures, while also utilizing ramp and removal spells to maintain board control. By using mana acceleration with cards like Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, this deck aims to quickly deploy threats such as Avenging Hunter and Nyxborn Hydra. In addition to its creature-based aggression, the deck includes removal spells like Ram Through and Malevolent Rumble to deal with opposing threats. The deck's strategy revolves around playing efficient threats early on and maintaining pressure throughout the game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan through counterspells and removal spells, while also utilizing card draw and graveyard recursion to maintain card advantage. It aims to quickly bring out efficient threats such as Gurmag Angler, Tolarian Terror, and Sneaky Snacker to close out the game. The deck includes a mix of efficient removal spells like Snuff Out and Cast Down, along with disruptive spells like Thought Scour and Abandon Attachments to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes lands that enable easy access to both blue and black mana sources.

This Pauper control deck utilizes the Ephemerate spell to recur key creature and draw cards, while controlling the board with counterspells and bounce effects. The deck focuses on value generation and card advantage through the use of Archaeomancer, Mulldrifter, and Sunscape Familiar. The inclusion of God-Pharaoh's Faithful provides additional life gain to help stabilize against aggressive decks. By utilizing bounce effects and counterspells, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating incremental advantage to ultimately win the game through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of cards like Ephemerate and Stonehorn Dignitary, allowing the player to stall the opponent while gradually gaining advantage. The deck also utilizes Archaeomancer to recur important spells and Mulldrifter for card advantage. Sunscape Familiar helps reduce the cost of spells, while cards like Prohibit and Negate provide additional control over the opponent's actions. The mana base is optimized for consistency and includes a mix of lands for fixing and recursion, making it an effective control deck in the Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game using low-cost creatures and spells that provide value, while also utilizing the cards Ephemerate and Ghostly Flicker to create powerful synergy with enter-the-battlefield effects. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by recurring key cards like Mulldrifter and Stonehorn Dignitary with Archaeomancer, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Negate and Prohibit. Additionally, the deck includes card draw and mana fixing to ensure consistency and stability in the early game.

The main focus of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Control - Gates deck is to establish board control and utilize the Gates to efficiently control the game. By using cards like Counterspell and Prismatic Strands to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect key creatures, while also leveraging cards like Brainstorm and Squadron Hawk for card advantage and deck thinning. The inclusion of cards like Guardian of the Guildpact and Outlaw Medic provide additional protection and aggression, allowing the player to establish a strong presence on the battlefield and ultimately outmaneuver their opponents to secure victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game with removal spells and utilizing creature sacrifice effects to gain advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating value from sacrificing creatures and drawing cards. The key strategy is to maintain board presence with tokens from Khalni Garden and control the opponent's threats with removal spells like Skred and Cast Down. The deck also has options for card draw and graveyard hate with Nihil Spellbomb. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue the opponent through efficient removal and incremental advantage.

This deck focuses on filling the graveyard with creatures using cards like Satyr Wayfinder and Stinkweed Imp, and then bringing them back onto the battlefield with Dread Return. Lotleth Giant and Malevolent Rumble provide finishers to close out the game. Additionally, Generous Ent and Molten Gatekeeper help to ramp up mana production, allowing for more powerful plays. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of reanimated creatures.

This deck focuses on deploying cheap artifacts and leveraging the Affinity mechanic to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of threats. By taking advantage of efficient creatures like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar, combined with powerful spells like Galvanic Blast and Thoughtcast, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain a relentless assault on the opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Krark-Clan Shaman disrupts the opponent's strategy while further enhancing the deck's aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on aggressively utilizing creatures and spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By playing a combination of low-cost creatures and removal spells, it aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while establishing a strong presence on the battlefield. With a mix of creature sacrifice effects and card draw mechanics, the deck can consistently generate card advantage and maintain tempo throughout the game. The mana base is designed to support the deck's multicolor requirements while also providing additional utility through land destruction and card filtering.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and removal spells, while also disrupting their strategy with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Cleansing Wildfire. Using cards like Refurbished Familiar and Writhing Chrysalis, the deck aims to keep the pressure on the opponent and maintain card advantage. The inclusion of versatile cards like Fanatical Offering and Krark-Clan Shaman allows for flexibility in handling different types of threats. Overall, the deck focuses on a proactive strategy of aggression and disruption to secure victory.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using cheap, efficient burn spells and aggressive creatures. By consistently attacking their life total with direct damage from spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, as well as triggering Guttersnipe's ability, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Faithless Looting for card advantage and Grab the Prize for extra resources, ensuring that the aggressive strategy can be maintained throughout the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and efficient burn spells to deal damage quickly and consistently to the opponent. By combining aggressive creatures like Guttersnipe and Voldaren Epicure with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a barrage of direct damage. Cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help maintain card advantage and keep the pressure on, while Highway Robbery serves as a finisher to close out games. The strategy is to apply continuous pressure and outpace the opponent in a fast-paced 1 vs 1 Pauper matchup.

This deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures and efficiently countering opponents' spells while utilizing card draw and graveyard interaction to maintain momentum. The goal is to establish a fast and aggressive board presence using evasive creatures to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The deck aims to control the game tempo through counterspells and card filtering effects to ensure a steady stream of threats and disruption. By leveraging both cheap spells and card advantage, this deck seeks to overwhelm opponents with relentless pressure and efficient resource management.

The focus of this deck is on quick, efficient creatures and card advantage to overwhelm the opponent with a variety of threats. By using cheap creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent, along with card draw spells like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells like Counterspell and Dispel. The inclusion of bounce spells like Tolarian Terror and Sleep of the Dead also helps to maintain board control and keep the opponent on the back foot.

The main focus of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly using Urza's lands to reach a powerful late-game with Urzatron. By using control elements like Malevolent Rumble and Pactdoll Terror, supported by card draw and token creation, the deck aims to dominate the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Myr creatures and Ashnod's Altar provides versatility and additional win conditions. Overall, this deck is designed to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost, efficient white creatures to deal damage as quickly as possible. The deck includes creatures with flying to evade blockers and abilities to generate additional tokens for increased board presence. It also includes spells to protect your creatures and boost their power, allowing for aggressive attacks. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain a strong battlefield presence to secure a swift victory.
